name: @kolm/constrained-worker
description: W809 - constrained decoding worker. Thin Node shell that spawns a Python decoder wrapping `outlines` or `lm-format-enforcer` for JSON-Schema-guided sampling. Heavy ML deps (outlines/lm-format-enforcer + torch + a base model) stay OUTSIDE Node; root kolm install pulls ZERO constrained-decoder deps. On a host without either library the worker emits an honest envelope (exit 3, no_constrained_decoder) + an install hint; it never silently falls back to unconstrained sampling.

python.note: Default decoder is python3 workers/constrained/scripts/constrained.py which imports outlines OR lm-format-enforcer at runtime. Override the launcher via $CONSTRAINED_DECODE_CMD (single command OR JSON array, e.g. CONSTRAINED_DECODE_CMD='["node","stub.js"]'). When neither outlines nor lm-format-enforcer is importable the Python script exits 3 with {ok:false, error:'no_constrained_decoder', hint:'pip install outlines OR lm-format-enforcer'}.
